philosophy: LUSORAE EDITORIAL: SSS-tier, highly structured, minimal noise, high density, culturally infused. No fake doodles, no aggressive 3D offset shadows.

professions_perspectives.editorial_art_director: Drive hierarchy through typography. Use 'Fraunces' for pull quotes and expressive moments, 'JetBrains Mono' for metadata and kickers, 'Inter' for UI density. Generous whitespace in reading areas.
professions_perspectives.product_designer: Optimize for scanability. F-pattern reading for Feed. Predictable interaction models. Cards should feel tactile but not heavy.
professions_perspectives.motion_designer: Spring physics for micro-interactions (stiffness: 400, damping: 30). Magnetic buttons for primary CTAs. Subtle hover lifts (-translate-y-1) on cards.
professions_perspectives.frontend_architect: Maintain zero new dependencies. Use Shadcn primitives heavily customized for the Editorial theme. Rely on Tailwind arbitrary values for exact tokens if needed.
professions_perspectives.brand_designer: Inject Portuguese identity via functional color accents (gold, green, red, azul) and localized copy (e.g., 'LISBOA', 'MANHÃ', 'Fado').

hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-ui font-bold tracking-tight text-ink

layout_and_spacing.grid: Bento Grid protocol for Explore/Premium, Control Room grid for Feed/Notifications.
layout_and_spacing.containers: max-w-7xl mx-auto for shells. Max-width of 600px for Feed column to ensure optimal reading length.
layout_and_spacing.padding: Generous scaling: p-4 to p-8 inside cards, py-12 for sections.
layout_and_spacing.radii: Subtle: rounded-xl for main cards, rounded-full for pills, rounded-2xl for modals.

LeftSidebar.design: Clean vertical navigation. Remove chunky borders. Use subtle bg-black/5 on hover.
LeftSidebar.active_state: font-bold text-ink with a 2px vertical indicator on the left side (bg-red or bg-ink).
LeftSidebar.cta: Primary 'Publicar' button: fully rounded (pill), black background, white text, magnetic hover.

Feed.design: Linear-style timeline. Clean headers with backdrop-blur-md bg-paper/80. Sticky tabs.
Feed.post_cards: No heavy borders. border border-black/5. White background (bg-cream). Hover applies soft lift and diffuse shadow. Avatar is circular.
Feed.typography: Post body in Inter 15px. Quotes/Reposts use Fraunces italics with a left border.

StoriesBar.design: Horizontal scroll. Avatars with 2px offset border. Unread state uses a gradient ring (gold to red). Read state uses solid gray ring.
StoriesBar.size: w-16 h-16 avatars to feel tactile and premium.

Messages.design: Split pane on desktop (List left, Chat right). Clean, Messenger/iMessage-like bubble density.
Messages.bubbles: Sent: bg-ink text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm. Received: bg-bone text-ink rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm.
Messages.list_item: Hover state bg-black/5. Unread indicator is a solid azul dot.

Explore.design: Bento grids. Top trending tags use large editorial typography. Horizontal scrolling rails for 'Pessoas para seguir'.
Explore.cards: Image heavy, use aspect-square or aspect-[4/5]. Image overlay bg-black/20 maximum.

Premium.design: High-end presentation. Use glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-white/40).
Premium.cards: Subtle grain texture overlay. Highlight tiers with gold accents.

Notifications.design: Dense list. Unread items have bg-blue-50/50 (subtle tint). Icons color-coded (heart=red, repost=green, follow=azul).

Legal.design: Swiss minimalist document. Wide left margin, sticky TOC on the left. Maximum readable line length (65 chars).
Legal.typography: Large h1, deeply indented paragraphs. Serifs for section headers.

premium_hero.description: Abstract light aura for premium background

explore_banner.location: Explore page top banner or featured community

instructions_to_main_agent: Load this JSON to understand the Lusorae Editorial SSS-tier style.
Remove any usage of offset 3D shadows (e.g., 'shadow-[4px_4px_0_#000]') and replace with standard Tailwind 'shadow-sm' or 'shadow-md'.
Replace overly rounded decorative borders (e.g., border-4 border-black) with 'border border-black/10' or 'border border-border'.
Implement the component overrides exactly as described in component_guidelines.
Ensure all interactive elements maintain their 'data-testid'.
Do not touch routing logic or backend fetching logic.
Use 'Inter' for body, 'JetBrains Mono' for small overlines, and 'Fraunces' specifically for quotes, headers, or premium tier names.
